hero.title:
Aangelina AI: The WhatsApp AI agent that
automates your
hero.subtitle: Revolutionize your restaurant management. Automate your orders, manage your inventory, handle complaints and coordinate deliveries with our intelligent AI agent specialized for restaurants

statusHero.title: Stop Wasting Mental Energy on
statusHero.subtitle: Your brain wasn't built for repetitive, mundane tasks. Automate your daily WhatsApp statuses, eliminate the anxiety of "forgetting to post," and reclaim your ultimate focus.

statusNeuro.title: The Hidden Cost of
statusNeuro.subtitle: Science tells us that relying on your memory to complete recurring administrative tasks drains your cognitive battery and limits your business potential.

zeigarnik.title: The Zeigarnik Effect
zeigarnik.description: Every time you remember "I need to post a status," your brain creates a loop of low-level anxiety. Unfinished tasks constantly occupy valuable mental space until they are completed.

decision.title: Decision Fatigue
decision.description: Interrupting an important creative workflow just to open your phone, select an image, and type a caption burns immediate willpower, meaning worse decisions later in the day.

inconsistency.title: Inconsistency Loss
inconsistency.description: Because your brain subconsciously avoids mundane chores, you end up posting sporadically. This breaks the habit with your audience and directly hurts your daily revenue.

statusFeatures.title: Design Your Week,
statusFeatures.subtitle: Psychology shows that offloading tasks to a trusted system instantly reduces stress. Spend 5 minutes on Monday scheduling your pipeline, and enjoy the peace of mind.

precision.title: One-Time Precision
precision.description: Launch a specific promotion exactly when it matters without picking up your phone. Schedule at 2:00 PM on Friday? Consider it done.

recurring.title: Set It & Forget It (Recurring)
recurring.description: Got a 'Motivation Monday' or 'Flash Sale Friday'? Set the frequency array once, and our engine will loop your beautiful content automatically every week.

media.title: Rich Media Native
media.description: Images? Videos? Text captions? Upload them seamlessly. Our Evolution API integration perfectly formats your media into native WhatsApp statuses.

background.title: Instant Background Execution
background.description: Zero overlap crashes and zero delays. Our robust polling engine runs in the absolute background while you focus on sealing deals with customers.

analytics.title: Status & Account Dashboard
analytics.description: Monitor all your scheduled and published statuses in one place. Track posting history, manage your WhatsApp connection status, and keep full control of your account from a clean central dashboard.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Bank-level encryption and secure API connections ensure your content and data are always protected.

statusCTA.title: Reclaim
statusCTA.subtitle: True freedom isn't just about having more time; it's about having more peace. Stop serving the algorithm manually and start letting Aangelina AI do the heavy lifting.

features.title: Powerful Features for
features.subtitle: Everything you need to streamline your restaurant operations and provide exceptional customer service through WhatsApp.
features.comingSoon: And many more features coming soon...

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your restaurant

orders.question: How does the agent handle orders?
orders.answer: Aangelina AI presents your menu, takes orders via numbers, automatically checks stock and sends digital invoices.

stocks.question: How does inventory management work?
stocks.answer: The agent checks your stock in real-time via Excel or API, suggests alternatives when out of stock and automatically updates after each order.

complaints.question: What happens with customer complaints?
complaints.answer: The agent analyzes problems, proposes automatic solutions (refund, discount) and escalates to manager for complex cases.

marketplace.question: What is Marketplace Mode?
marketplace.answer: Marketplace mode allows the main Aangelina AI assistant to manage all restaurant agents to help customers view, discuss and order from any restaurant.

amadou.name: Amadou Fall
amadou.content: Aangelina AI revolutionized our customer service. Orders are taken automatically, no more lost customers! Our sales increased by 45%.

fatou.name: Fatou Diallo
fatou.content: Inventory management is now automatic. The agent suggests alternatives when a dish is no longer available. Our customers love it!

jean.name: Jean-Baptiste Koffi
jean.content: Complaints are handled instantly. The agent proposes solutions and only bothers us for really important cases. Perfect!

marie.name: Marie Agbessi
marie.content: Aangelina AI coordinates our deliveries according to urgency and location. No more delays, no more unhappy customers!

kossi.name: Kossi Togbe
kossi.content: The agent informs us in real-time about available stock and allows quick addition of new products. Huge time saver!

grace.name: Grace Lawson
grace.content: Our customers receive notifications at every step: preparation, kitchen exit, delivery. The customer experience is exceptional!

configure.title: Configure Aangelina AI
configure.description: Restaurant configures Aangelina AI by providing restaurant details: menu, hours, location, and preferences in just a few minutes

generate.title: Agent generated with link & QR code
generate.description: Your personalized AI agent is automatically generated and you receive a unique link and QR code to share with your customers

deploy.title: Use in restaurant & share with clients
deploy.description: Deploy the agent in your restaurant and share the link/QR code with your clients to start receiving orders immediately

marketplace.title: Join the Marketplace Mode
marketplace.description: Your Aangelina AI agent is added to the agents network where the main Aangelina AI assistant manages all restaurant agents to help end users view, discuss, and order from any restaurant

footer.tagline: The AI agent that turns your WhatsApp into a sales assistant. Automate your sales and boost your revenue.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: At Aangelina AI, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your data when you use our WhatsApp automation service for business status management and communications.

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect: (1) Account Information - name, email, phone number, company details provided during registration, (2) WhatsApp Connection Data - WhatsApp Business account credentials and connection tokens, (3) Content Data - status images, captions, and scheduling information you upload, (4) Usage Data - feature usage, status posting history, and analytics, (5) Technical Data - device information, IP addresses, browser type, and access logs, and (6) Payment Information - billing details processed securely through FedaPay (we do not store full payment card details).

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.content: We use your information to: (1) provide and maintain the WhatsApp automation service, (2) post scheduled statuses to your WhatsApp Business account, (3) process payments and manage subscriptions, (4) send service notifications and updates, (5) provide customer support, (6) improve our platform through analytics, (7) detect and prevent fraud or abuse, and (8) comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

whatsappData.title: WhatsApp Integration
whatsappData.content: When you connect your WhatsApp Business account, we access only the permissions necessary to post statuses on your behalf. We do not read your WhatsApp messages, access your contact list beyond what's necessary for service operation, or store your WhatsApp conversations. Your WhatsApp connection can be revoked at any time from your dashboard.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including: (1) end-to-end encryption for data transmission, (2) secure cloud storage with Supabase, (3) regular security audits and monitoring, (4) access controls and authentication, (5) encrypted database backups, and (6) secure payment processing through certified partners. While we strive to protect your data, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. Status content is retained for 90 days after posting. After account deletion, we retain minimal data for 30 days for recovery purposes, then permanently delete all personal information except what we're legally required to keep for accounting or compliance purposes (typically 7 years for financial records).

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.content: You have the right to: (1) access your personal data, (2) correct inaccurate information, (3) delete your account and data, (4) export your data (data portability), (5) object to certain processing activities, (6) withdraw consent at any time, and (7) lodge a complaint with a data protection authority. To exercise these rights, contact us through your dashboard or at privacy@angelina-ai.com.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: We use trusted third-party services: (1) Supabase for database and authentication, (2) FedaPay for payment processing, (3) WhatsApp Business API for status posting, and (4) analytics tools for service improvement. These partners are contractually obligated to protect your data and use it only for specified purposes.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at privacy@angelina-ai.com or through our support channels in the dashboard. We will respond to all requests within 30 days.

intro.title: Agreement to Terms
intro.content: By accessing and using Aangelina AI's WhatsApp automation service, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

serviceDescription.title: Service Description
serviceDescription.content: Aangelina AI provides an intelligent WhatsApp automation platform that helps businesses automate their WhatsApp status updates and manage their WhatsApp business communications. We offer various subscription plans with different features including automated status posting, scheduling capabilities, and analytics. Our service integrates with WhatsApp Business API to deliver reliable automation.

userObligations.title: User Obligations
userObligations.content: You agree to: (1) provide accurate business information during registration, (2) maintain the security of your account credentials and WhatsApp connection, (3) use the service in compliance with WhatsApp's Terms of Service and applicable laws, (4) not misuse or attempt to disrupt our platform, (5) not use the service for spam or unauthorized marketing, and (6) ensure you have proper rights to any content you post through our service. You are responsible for all activities under your account.

payment.title: Payment Terms
payment.content: Subscription fees are billed monthly in FCFA based on your chosen plan: Free (0 FCFA, 0 statuses), Popular (2,000 FCFA, 15 statuses/month), or Pro (5,000 FCFA, unlimited statuses). Payments are processed securely through FedaPay. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time from your dashboard. Refunds are provided according to our refund policy. Unused status credits do not roll over to the next billing period.

whatsappIntegration.title: WhatsApp Integration
whatsappIntegration.content: Our service requires connection to your WhatsApp Business account. You authorize us to access your WhatsApp account for the purpose of posting statuses and managing your business communications. We do not store your WhatsApp messages or contact information beyond what is necessary for service operation. You can disconnect your WhatsApp account at any time from your dashboard.

dataUsage.title: Content and Data Usage
dataUsage.content: You retain all rights to the content you upload and post through our service. By using our service, you grant us a limited license to process, store, and transmit your content solely for the purpose of providing the service. We do not claim ownership of your content and will not use it for any purpose other than service delivery.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Aangelina AI is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We strive for 99.9% uptime but cannot guarantee uninterrupted service. We are not liable for: (1) WhatsApp API downtime or changes, (2) failed status posts due to WhatsApp restrictions, (3) account suspensions by WhatsApp, (4) indirect, incidental, or consequential damages, or (5) loss of business or revenue. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid for the service in the past 12 months.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account for: (1) violation of these terms, (2) non-payment, (3) misuse of the service, (4) violation of WhatsApp's policies, or (5) fraudulent activity. You may cancel your subscription at any time from your dashboard. Upon termination, your access to the service will cease immediately, and scheduled statuses will not be posted. We will retain your data for 30 days after termination for recovery purposes.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.content: For questions about these Terms & Conditions, please contact us at support@angelina-ai.com or through our support channels in the dashboard.
